name: agentcairn
description: Local-first agent memory for Codex — recall, remember, and ambient capture into a Markdown vault you own.

interface.shortDescription: Local-first agent memory: recall, remember, ambient capture.
interface.longDescription: agentcairn gives Codex a persistent, local-first memory: an Obsidian-compatible Markdown vault you own, with hybrid recall, a remember tool, and out-of-band capture of your sessions. No external database, no daemon.
